title: Russian Chicken Wings with Fermented Sauce
description: A twist on traditional buffalo wings, this recipe uses fermented Russian sauce for a tangy and flavorful twist. Serve as an appetizer or snack.
instructions: Rinse the chicken wings and pat them dry with paper towels.
In a large bowl, mix together the fermented Russian sauce, butter, garlic, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chicken wings to the bowl and toss them to coat evenly with the sauce.
Line a baking sheet with aluminum foil and spray with cooking spray. Arrange the chicken wings on the baking sheet.
Bake the chicken wings in the preheated oven for 25-30 minutes, or until cooked through.
Remove the chicken wings from the oven and garnish with chopped parsley if desired.
Serve the Russian chicken wings hot and enjoy!
